patch.description:
Switches your active account type for your current role (CLIENT or CREATIVE).

**Individual (PERSONAL):** Personal freelancer or individual client profile.
**Business (BUSINESS):** Business entity or company profile.

If you are switching to Business for the first time, a new Business context is created automatically and you will be prompted to complete business verification (KYB).

Each account type maintains its own independent verification status. Switching does not affect your existing verification.

**BUSINESS** verificationType → `business-kyc` level
post.summary: Start a new KYC (individual) or KYB (business) verification session

post.description: Only allowed when the current verificationStatus is DECLINED. Returns a fresh SumSub SDK token. SumSub reuses the same applicant record.
post.summary: Restart verification after a DECLINED case

post.description: SumSub SDK tokens expire after ~10 minutes. If the user is still in the verification flow when the token expires, the SDK fires its token expiry callback. Your client should call this endpoint and return the new token to the SDK callback. Pass the same contextType and verificationType.
post.summary: Refresh an expiring SumSub SDK token mid-session

post.description:
Called after the user receives a **"documents required"** email or push notification.

**Full flow:**
1. Admin calls `POST /admin/verification/:id/request-documents` with an instruction
2. User receives email + push: *"Please upload a utility bill for proof of address"*
3. User opens app → sees instruction on the Verification screen (from `GET /verification/pending-requests`)
4. User taps **"Upload Document"** and selects a file
5. App calls this endpoint — file is uploaded to AWS S3
6. Case transitions: `DOCUMENTS_REQUESTED` → `DOCUMENTS_UPLOADED`
7. Admin is notified automatically via email + push

Accepts up to **5 files** as `multipart/form-data`.

requestLabel.description: Copy of the admin's instruction for traceability (optional but recommended)
requestLabel.example: utility bill for proof of address

documents.description: Document files — jpg, png, or pdf. Max 5 files.

post.summary: Upload document(s) requested by the compliance admin

get.description:
Returns the list of documents the compliance admin has asked the user to upload, along with any documents the user has already uploaded in response.

The app renders this as the **"Action Required"** screen showing:
- Each instruction (e.g. *"Please upload a utility bill..."*)
- Files already uploaded in response
- Whether the case is still waiting (`DOCUMENTS_REQUESTED`) or uploaded (`DOCUMENTS_UPLOADED`)
get.summary: Get outstanding admin document requests for this user
Get verification status for all user contexts
Get verification status for a specific context
Get full KYC/KYB audit trail for the authenticated user

get.description: Returns **PENDING**, **PROVIDER_APPROVED**, **PROVIDER_FLAGGED**, **DOCUMENTS_REQUESTED**, and **DOCUMENTS_UPLOADED** cases — ordered oldest-first.
get.summary: Paginated list of cases in any actionable state

get.description:
SumSub document images require signed API headers and cannot be loaded in a browser directly. This endpoint validates admin access, fetches the image bytes from SumSub, and streams them to the client.

Use the `imageProxyPath` values returned by `GET /:id` or `GET /:id/sumsub-details` to build the request URL.
get.summary: Stream a SumSub document image securely to the admin browser

get.description:
Returns case metadata, SumSub review result (reviewAnswer, rejectLabels), a document image list with `imageProxyPath` values for secure image viewing, and the full verification history.

For the complete SumSub applicant profile, use `GET /:id/sumsub-details` (Super Admin).
get.summary: Full case detail with SumSub review data and document list

get.description:
Calls the SumSub REST API to retrieve the complete applicant object and a list of document images (each with an `imageProxyPath` for secure streaming).

**`applicantData`** — Full SumSub profile (name, DOB, nationality, address)

**`documentImages`** — List of documents with `imageProxyPath` values. Use `GET /admin/verification/image-proxy?applicantId=...&imageId=...` to view each image.

**`inspectionUrl`** — Deep-link to the SumSub admin cockpit for the full review interface.

Requires **SUPER_ADMIN** role. Every call is written to the ActivityLog.
get.summary: Super Admin only — Fetch full live applicant profile and document images from SumSub

patch.description: Sets case and UserContext status to **VERIFIED**. Sends the user an approval email and push notification.
Sets case and UserContext to **DECLINED**. The `reason` is shown to the user in the decline email and on their dashboard. They can resubmit via `POST /verification/resubmit`.
patch.summary: Decline a verification case with a reason

post.description:
Resets the specified SumSub verification step(s) so the user can re-upload via the SDK, then sends an email and push notification with the instruction.

**`documentRequest`** — Plain-English instruction shown verbatim to the user.

**`idDocSetTypes`** — Optional. Specific SumSub step types to reset:
`IDENTITY`, `SELFIE`, `PROOF_OF_RESIDENCE`, `COMPANY_QUESTIONNAIRE`, etc.
If omitted, **all** verification steps are reset.

**User flow after this call:**
1. SumSub verification steps are reset
2. User receives email + push with the instruction
3. User taps the notification → opens app → launches SumSub SDK
   (app calls `POST /verification/token-refresh` to get a fresh SDK token)
4. User completes the upload inside the SumSub SDK
5. SumSub sends a new webhook → case updated automatically

documentRequest.example: Please upload a utility bill dated within the last 3 months as proof of address.

idDocSetTypes.description: Optional SumSub step types to reset. Omit to reset all steps.

post.summary: Request additional document(s) from the user via SumSub + email + push

get.description:
**`requests`** — Every instruction the admin has sent to the user for this case.

**`uploadedDocuments`** — Files the user uploaded to AWS S3 in response, each with a **24-hour presigned S3 URL** for secure viewing and the `requestLabel` linking it to the instruction that triggered the upload.

Note: these are documents uploaded by the user to our S3 bucket. For documents submitted directly through the SumSub SDK, use `GET /:id/sumsub-details`.
get.summary: List all admin document requests and the S3 documents uploaded in response

patch.description:
Bypasses the normal approval/decline flow. Requires **SUPER_ADMIN** role.

Recorded in both `VerificationHistory` and `ActivityLog` for compliance audit.
patch.summary: Super Admin only — Force-set verification status on a case

post.description:
Creates 1–50 services under the specified category in a single atomic transaction.

**All-or-nothing:** if any name conflicts with an existing service in the category, the entire batch is rejected and no services are created.

**Images:** cannot be set in bulk. Add them individually via `PATCH /admin/platform-services/:id` afterwards.
post.summary: SuperAdmin: Bulk-create multiple services under a category

post.description: Skills now belong to PlatformService (not Category). Pass `serviceId`.
post.summary: SuperAdmin: Create a single skill under a platform service

patch.description: Pass `serviceId` to move the skill to a different platform service.

post.description:
Creates 1–100 skills under the specified service in a single atomic transaction.

**All-or-nothing:** if any name conflicts with an existing skill in the service, the entire batch is rejected and no skills are created.

**Body:** a flat array of skill name strings — no need for IDs or extra fields.

**Recommended workflow for setting up a new service:**
1. `POST /admin/categories/:id/services/bulk` — create the services
2. `POST /admin/platform-services/:id/skills/bulk` — add skills to each service

patch.summary: Update progress on an enrolled course (Creative only)

post.description: Marks enrollment as COMPLETED. If course.certificateIncluded=true, enqueues a BullMQ certificate.queue job. Returns { completed, certificatePending }.
post.summary: Mark a course as COMPLETED and trigger certificate generation if applicable (Creative only)

get.summary: Get pre-signed S3 URL for the certificate (TTL 7 days) (Creative only)

post.description: Sets Certification.addedToProfile=true. Certificate then appears in /creatives/:id/public-profile.
post.summary: Add certificate to public creative profile (Creative only)

post.description: Generates a sequential case number (#CS-YEAR-XXXX). Optionally uploads a screenshot to S3. Notifies support admin via BullMQ.
post.summary: Create a support case

get.summary: Get the current user's support cases (ordered by createdAt DESC)
Get all published FAQ articles grouped by category (Redis cached)

get.description: Returns summary fields: id, title, category, readTime.
get.summary: Browse help articles by category (Redis cached)
Get full content of a single help article

get.description: Returns { token, appId, userHash }. Provider (Intercom/Crisp) is read from SupportContactInfo.liveChatProvider.
get.summary: Generate a signed identity token for Intercom or Crisp live chat

get.description: Returns: whatsappNumber, emailAddress, communityForumUrl, supportPhoneNumber, liveChatProvider.
get.summary: Get platform support contact information (Redis cached)

info.title: JubalBoard API
info.description:
### 🚀 Total Active Endpoints: **348**

The JubalBoard API Specifications connecting Clients and Creatives.

role.description: The primary role chosen at sign up (e.g., CLIENT or CREATIVE)

token.description: The identity/access token received from the OAuth provider

role.description: The role to assign if creating a new user (e.g., CLIENT or CREATIVE)

name.description: Required for Apple login on first sign-in only, as Apple does not embed the name in the token

phoneNumber.description: Required only if method is SMS

code.description: The 6-digit code sent to the device

mfaSessionToken.description: The temporary token received during the initial login step

method.description: The fallback method requested: SMS or EMAIL

mfaSessionToken.description: The short-lived JWT returned during login when MFA is required

code.description: The 6-digit code from Google Auth, SMS, or Email or or an 8-character backup code

method.description: Required for 6-digit codes. Must be AUTHENTICATOR_APP, SMS, or EMAIL

message.example: Backup codes generated. Save these immediately. They will never be shown again.

code.description: Required for OAuth/Social users who do not have a password
The 6-digit OTP sent to the email
6-digit code sent to the new email

fullName.description: Full legal name of the client

categoriesOfInterest.description: Array of category IDs the client is interested in
Array of category IDs the business is interested in

newProposalInApp.description: Receive in-app alert for new proposals

pitchApprovedEmail.description: Receive email when pitch is approved

pitchApprovedPush.description: Receive push when pitch is approved

pitchApprovedInApp.description: Receive in-app alert when pitch is approved

pitchRejectedEmail.description: Receive email when pitch is rejected

pitchRejectedPush.description: Receive push when pitch is rejected

pitchRejectedInApp.description: Receive in-app alert when pitch is rejected

projectMilestoneInApp.description: Receive in-app alert for project milestones

deliverableSubmittedEmail.description: Receive email when deliverable is submitted

deliverableSubmittedPush.description: Receive push when deliverable is submitted

deliverableSubmittedInApp.description: Receive in-app alert when deliverable is submitted

revisionRequestedEmail.description: Receive email when revision is requested

revisionRequestedPush.description: Receive push when revision is requested

revisionRequestedInApp.description: Receive in-app alert when revision is requested

projectCompletedEmail.description: Receive email when project is completed

projectCompletedPush.description: Receive push when project is completed

projectCompletedInApp.description: Receive in-app alert when project is completed

paymentMadeEmail.description: Receive email when payment is made

paymentMadePush.description: Receive push when payment is made

paymentMadeInApp.description: Receive in-app alert when payment is made

withdrawalMadeEmail.description: Receive email when withdrawal is made

withdrawalMadePush.description: Receive push when withdrawal is made

withdrawalMadeInApp.description: Receive in-app alert when withdrawal is made

newMessageInApp.description: Receive in-app alert for new messages

collabInviteInApp.description: Receive in-app alert for collaboration invites

newReviewInApp.description: Receive in-app alert for new reviews

accountSuspendedInApp.description: Receive in-app alert for account suspension

appUpdateInApp.description: Receive in-app alert for app updates

promotionOfferInApp.description: Receive in-app alert for promotional offers

showOnlineStatus.description: Show online status to other users

showBusinessNamePublicly.description: Show business name publicly instead of personal name

showProfileToVerifiedOnly.description: Only verified users can view profile

allowDirectMessages.description: Allow users to send direct messages

onlyAcceptMessagesFromAccepted.description: Only accept messages from users who have worked with you

sameCountryOnly.description: Restrict interactions to same country only

portfolioRequired.description: Require portfolio to submit a pitch

autoWithdrawal.description: Automatically withdraw funds when threshold is met

withdrawalThreshold.description: Threshold amount to trigger auto withdrawal

currentPassword.description: Current password is required to authorize email change

newEmail.description: The new email address you want to use
New email address to change to

currentPassword.description: Current password — required when changing email address

newProposalEmail.description: Email alert when a brief invitation arrives

pitchApprovedEmail.description: Alert when the client approves a pitch

pitchRejectedEmail.description: Alert when the client rejects a pitch

projectMilestoneEmail.description: Alert when a project milestone status changes

revisionRequestedEmail.description: Alert when client requests a revision

projectCompletedEmail.description: Alert when client marks project completed

paymentMadeEmail.description: Alert when a payment is received into escrow

withdrawalMadeEmail.description: Alert when a withdrawal is processed

newMessageEmail.description: Alert when a new direct message arrives

collabInviteEmail.description: Alert when a collab invite is received

newReviewEmail.description: Alert when a client leaves a review

showOnlineStatus.description: Show online indicator to other users

showBusinessNamePublicly.description: Show business name publicly instead of personal name

showProfileToVerifiedOnly.description: Only KYC-verified clients can view your profile

allowDirectMessages.description: Allow other users to send direct messages

onlyAcceptMessagesFromAccepted.description: Only accept messages from clients you have worked with

sameCountryOnly.description: Only show profile to clients in the same country

themeMode.description: UI theme mode: LIGHT | DARK | SYSTEM

fontSize.description: UI font size: SMALL | MEDIUM | LARGE

minimumPayoutThreshold.description: Minimum payout threshold in account currency

briefInvitationInApp.description: Receive in-app alert for brief invitations/proposals

paymentMadeEmail.description: Receive email when payment is made

paymentMadePush.description: Receive push when payment is made

paymentMadeInApp.description: Receive in-app alert when payment is made

showOnlineStatus.description: Show online status to other users

showBusinessNamePublicly.description: Show business name publicly instead of personal name

showProfileToVerifiedOnly.description: Only verified users can view profile

autoWithdrawal.description: Automatically withdraw funds when threshold is met

withdrawalThreshold.description: Threshold amount to trigger auto withdrawal

loginAlertsEnabled.description: Enable/disable email/SMS alerts for new logins

targetAccountType.description: The account type to switch to. PERSONAL = Individual, BUSINESS = Business.

releaseNotes.example: Added new portfolio features and critical bug fixes.

token.description: The FCM device registration token from the client app.

platform.description: The platform/OS of the device: IOS, ANDROID, or WEB.

amount.description: Amount to add in the account currency (e.g. 50.00 = $50)

paymentMethodType.description: Payment method type to use. Leave blank (or use "automatic") to enable all Stripe-supported methods (card, Google Pay, Apple Pay). Use "paypal" to restrict to PayPal only. Use "bank_transfer" for ACH / US bank account funding. The frontend passes the PaymentIntent clientSecret to the Stripe SDK and the SDK presents the correct UI for the chosen method.

amount.description: Amount to withdraw in the wallet currency

mfaCode.description: MFA verification code — required when the user has MFA enabled (MfaSetting.isEnabled = true). Provide the 6-digit TOTP/SMS code.

stripePaymentMethodId.description: Stripe PaymentMethod ID created client-side with stripe.createPaymentMethod()

returnUrl.description: URL to redirect the creative to after they complete Stripe onboarding. Example: https://yourapp.com/settings/bank?connected=true

refreshUrl.description: URL to redirect the creative to if the onboarding link expires or they navigate away before completing. Your frontend should call this endpoint again to generate a fresh link.

verificationType.description: IDENTITY → individual-kyc level (personal KYC). BUSINESS → business-kyc level (company KYB).

sdkToken.description: Short-lived SumSub SDK access token (~10 min). Pass to SumsubWebSdk.init() (web) or SNSMobileSDK.Builder() (React Native).

externalUserId.description: Format: userId_contextType. Stored on VerificationCase for webhook correlation.

message.example: Verification session started. Launch the SumSub SDK with the provided token.

verificationType.description: IDENTITY → individual-kyc level (personal KYC). BUSINESS → business-kyc level (company KYB).
IDENTITY → individual-kyc level (personal KYC). BUSINESS → business-kyc level (company KYB).

message.example: Documents uploaded successfully. Our compliance team will review them shortly.

instruction.example: Please upload a utility bill (electricity, water, or gas) dated within the last 3 months.
instruction.description: The exact instruction text the admin entered. Shown verbatim in the app.

requestLabel.example: utility bill for proof of address

hasPendingRequest.description: True if the case is currently in DOCUMENTS_REQUESTED state

caseStatus.description: Current case status — DOCUMENTS_REQUESTED or DOCUMENTS_UPLOADED

requests.description: Each admin instruction the user needs to respond to

uploadedDocuments.description: Documents the user has already uploaded in response to requests

externalUserId.description: The externalUserId sent to SumSub — used for live API lookups

reviewResult.description: Raw SumSub review result from webhook (reviewAnswer + rejectLabels)

watchlistResult.description: AML / PEP / sanctions watchlist result from SumSub

source.description: SUMSUB_VERIFIED = processed by SumSub | ADMIN_REQUESTED = user uploaded to S3

requestLabel.example: utility bill for proof of address
requestLabel.description: The admin's instruction text — stored for full traceability.

signedUrl.description: 24-hour presigned S3 URL (admin-facing only, not returned to users)

verificationType.description: IDENTITY = individual KYC | BUSINESS = company KYB

declineReason.example: The uploaded ID image was too blurry to process.

sumsubDocuments.description: What SumSub collected and processed — sourced from the webhook payload. For full OCR + image inspection, Super Admin calls GET /:id/sumsub-details.

adminRequestedDocuments.description: Files the user manually uploaded to S3 in response to admin document requests. Each document includes a 24-hour presigned S3 URL for secure viewing.

adminNote.example: Please upload a utility bill dated within the last 3 months.

applicantData.description: Full applicant profile object from SumSub REST API

documentInspection.description: Document inspection results from SumSub — includes document images, OCR output, and fraud signals. Null if SumSub has not yet completed review.

storedProviderResult.description: The reviewResult we stored locally when the webhook arrived

storedWatchlistResult.description: The watchlistResult stored from the webhook

reason.description: Reason shown to the user in the decline email and on their dashboard.
reason.example: The uploaded ID image is too blurry to read. Please resubmit with a clearer photo.

instruction.example: Please upload a utility bill dated within the last 3 months.

uploadedDocuments.description: Files uploaded by the user. Each has a 24-hour presigned S3 URL for secure viewing.

newStatus.description: The new verification status to force-set on this case.

reason.description: Mandatory reason for override — logged in VerificationHistory and ActivityLog.
reason.example: Manually verified via in-person meeting at Lagos office on 2026-04-03.

details.description: Detailed explanation of the suspension decision

expiresAt.description: ISO date string for suspension expiry (omit for indefinite)

confirmedByAdminId.description: ID of the confirming admin (SuperAdmin only)

projectId.description: ID of the project to reassign

newCreativeId.description: ID of the new lead creative

highValueExpiresAt.description: Expiry date for TEMPORARY designation (ISO string)

expiresAt.description: Expiry date for TEMPORARY ban (ISO string); required when type=TEMPORARY

violationType.description: Category of violation (e.g. MISSED_DEADLINE, FRAUD, UNPROFESSIONAL)

warningMessage.description: Warning message delivered to the creative

status.description: New project status to force (e.g. IN_PROGRESS, ON_HOLD, COMPLETED)

reason.description: Admin reason for forcing this status change

newCreativeId.description: UUID of the new lead creative

removeLateDeliveryPenalty.description: If true, remove any existing late delivery penalty flags

notifyBoth.description: If true, send a notification to both client and creative

freezeAccounts.description: If true, suspend both project parties

notifyFinance.description: If true, enqueue a BullMQ finance notification job

acknowledgePayoutEffect.description: Must be true — admin acknowledges the payout/timeline effect of re-opening

note.description: Note text to append to Project.adminNote (timestamped + admin-prefixed automatically)

extendDeadline.description: New dueDate if timeline needs extending alongside the extra revision

notifyBoth.description: If true, notify both parties of the approval

revisionRequestId.description: ID of the RevisionRequest to flag as out-of-scope

adminId.description: UUID of the admin to assign to this dispute

assignInternalMediator.description: If true, assign an internal mediator (the requesting admin)

freezeAllPayouts.description: If true, freeze all ScheduledPayouts for this project

resolutionNote.description: Admin resolution notes (required for audit log)

creativeAmount.description: Creative payout amount — required for SPLIT resolution

clientAmount.description: Client refund amount — required for SPLIT resolution

fullRefund.description: If true, refund the full escrow amount

partialAmount.description: Partial refund amount — used when fullRefund=false

notes.description: Context notes for the escalation team

userId.description: ID of the user to suspend or ban

autoPayout.description: true = enable 48h auto-payout timer; false = require manual FINANCE_ADMIN approval for every release

pauseWithdrawals.description: If true, pause all withdrawals for the creative on this payout

notifyFinance.description: If true, enqueue a BullMQ finance alert job to FINANCE_ADMIN

escrowId.description: Project or escrow ID to refund

name.description: Full name of the new admin staff member

email.description: Email address (used for login and invitation email)

departmentId.description: UUID of the department to assign this staff member to

role.description: New role to assign to the staff member

confirm.description: Must be true to confirm re-seeding default permissions for the new role

permissions.description: Array of permission overrides to upsert

confirmation.description: Must equal "DELETE STAFF" to confirm permanent deletion

cost.description: Set to 0 for a free course

level.description: Course level: BEGINNER | INTERMEDIATE | ADVANCED | ALL

certificateIncluded.description: Whether completing this course generates a downloadable certificate

skillTags.description: Skill tags for filtering on the learning hub

description.example: Learn the core principles of brand identity...

visibility.description: ENABLED shows to learners; DISABLED hides the course

modules.description: Modules that make up this course. courseOutline is auto-generated from these.

level.description: Skill level: BEGINNER | INTERMEDIATE | ADVANCED | ALL

visibility.description: ENABLED shows to learners; DISABLED hides the resource

adminId.description: UUID of the admin staff member to assign this ticket to

resolutionNote.description: Optional resolution note — included in the notification email sent to the user
resolutionNote.example: Your issue has been resolved. The payment was refunded within 3–5 business days.

status.description: New status for the support ticket

reportType.description: Which report to generate and export

dateRange.description: Optional date range for filtering exported data

serviceFeePercent.description: Platform service fee as a percentage of the agreed amount (e.g. 15 = 15%)

payoutFeePercent.description: Fee deducted from creative withdrawals as a percentage (e.g. 2 = 2%)

withdrawalMinAmount.description: Minimum wallet balance (USD) required before a creative can withdraw

autoPayoutEnabled.description: Global toggle: true = 48h auto-payout after milestone approval; false = FINANCE_ADMIN must manually approve each milestone payment release

symbol.description: Currency symbol displayed in the UI

permissionKey.description: Unique dot-separated key — must match what is used in @Permissions() decorators

roleType.description: Admin role this permission rule applies to

description.example: Allows freezing and releasing escrow funds
description.description: Human-readable description of what this permission grants

minRating.description: Minimum overall rating (1–5) needed for premium eligibility

minReviews.description: Minimum number of client reviews required

minCompletedProjects.description: Minimum number of successfully completed projects required

liveChatProvider.description: Live chat provider name: intercom | crisp | none

reviewNote.description: Optional note to include in the notification email sent to the user

serviceId.description: UUID of the PlatformService this skill belongs to

categoryId.description: UUID of the Category this service belongs to

description.example: Complete brand identity design including logos.

skills.description: Skills that belong to this service

description.example: Graphic design, UI/UX, and creative direction.

services.description: Services that belong to this category. Each service contains its own skills.

description.example: Graphic design, UI/UX, and creative direction.

services.description: Array of services to create under the category. Max 50 per request.

example.name: Brand Identity
example.description: Logos, colour palettes, and brand guidelines.

serviceId.description: UUID of the parent PlatformService (NOT the category)
Move skill to a different PlatformService

skills.description: Array of skill names to create under the service. Max 100 per request.

specificSkills.description: Array of skill UUIDs required for the brief
Array of skill UUIDs required for the brief

creativeId.description: UUID of the creative to send the brief to

title.description: Short title for the milestone (e.g. "Initial Wireframes")

description.description: §3.4 required — scope and description of this milestone

notes.description: §3.4 required — deliverables specific to this milestone (what will be delivered)

briefId.description: UUID of the brief being pitched for

coverNote.description: §3.3 — Cover note is REQUIRED. Returns 400 if absent.

paymentMode.description: §3.4 — REQUIRED. Binding payment mode: MILESTONE (per-milestone releases with 48h auto-payout) or END_OF_PROJECT (single release at completion). Cannot be changed after pitch is accepted.

isCollaborative.description: §3.5 — Set true when the creative cannot fulfil the brief alone and agrees to recruit collaborators. Triggers COLLAB_PENDING project status after client payment. Required only when the brief requires more creatives than the creative can provide.

milestones.description: §3.4 — Required when paymentMode=MILESTONE. Each milestone must have a description and deliverables. May be empty array for END_OF_PROJECT mode.

briefId.description: UUID of the brief being pitched for

coverNote.description: §3.3 — Cover note is REQUIRED. Returns 400 if absent.

paymentMode.description: §3.4 — REQUIRED. Binding payment mode: MILESTONE (per-milestone releases with 48h auto-payout) or END_OF_PROJECT (single release at completion). Cannot be changed after pitch is accepted.

isCollaborative.description: §3.5 — Set true when the creative cannot fulfil the brief alone and agrees to recruit collaborators. Triggers COLLAB_PENDING project status after client payment. Required only when the brief requires more creatives than the creative can provide.

milestones.description: §3.4 — Required when paymentMode=MILESTONE. Each milestone must have a description and deliverables. May be empty array for END_OF_PROJECT mode.

requestNotes.description: Detailed reason for requesting a revision

creativeId.description: UUID of the creative to favorite

briefId.description: UUID of the brief to send to this creative

addToFavorites.description: Also add the creative to favorites after reviewing

recipientId.description: UUID of the user to start a conversation with (the recipient)

topicId.description: §6.1 Topic-First Rule: FK to ChatTopic. REQUIRED. Must be an active topic. Return 400 if missing or inactive.

content.description: Message body. For TEXT type this is the visible text.
content.example: Hey, looking forward to working with you!

contentType.description: Content type: TEXT (plain message), IMAGE (attached image), or FILE (any document)

fileUrl.description: S3 pre-signed URL or permanent URL for IMAGE/FILE messages. Required when contentType != TEXT.

projectId.description: The project UUID this conversation is being cited against. Stored in ConversationCitation for transaction tracking.

note.description: Optional free-text note about why this conversation is being cited
note.example: Cited as part of milestone 2 sign-off discussion.

description.description: Optional longer description shown to users in the topic selector
description.example: Use this topic to initiate a new project collaboration.

slaThresholdHours.description: SLA warning threshold in hours. An admin alert fires if a conversation under this topic has no response within this window.

isActive.description: Whether this topic is visible in the topic selector. Defaults to true.

slaThresholdHours.description: Updated SLA threshold in hours. Changing this only affects future SLA calculations.

isActive.description: Set to false to deactivate the topic (remove from selector). Existing conversations are NOT affected.

planId.description: ID of the PremiumPlan to subscribe to

stripePaymentMethodId.description: Stripe PaymentMethod ID to charge (already attached to the Stripe customer)

completedSections.description: Array of completed section IDs or names

progressPercentage.description: Overall progress percentage (0–100). If 100 is set, do NOT auto-complete — use /complete instead.
